overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dystopian futuristic game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a hooded player character navigating through a sunlit, overgrown urban wasteland. The character moves from an open concrete plaza through a tunnel and into narrow industrial alleyways with scattered NPCs and derelict architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict urban plaza with overgrown vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the open dirt plaza toward a large concrete archway entrance

notable_agents.action: crouching near the abandoned red sedan, appearing to scavenge or inspect something

entered.detail: massive futuristic concrete structure serving as entrance to an underpass
derelict red car with rust and damage, partially buried in dirt
scattered sheets of rusted metal lying on the ground
large concrete jersey barriers arranged in a line

segments.scene_description: The player character walks across a sunlit, dusty plaza surrounded by futuristic derelict buildings. An NPC crouches near an abandoned red car on the left while the character heads toward a massive concrete archway ahead. The area shows signs of decay with scattered debris and dry vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete underpass with overhead wiring

events.description: character enters the covered tunnel under the concrete archway, moving from open plaza to enclosed passage
lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to dimmer mixed lighting with orange neon fixtures overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the tunnel underpass, passing other pedestrians moving in both directions

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera, exiting the tunnel

entered.detail: tall gray concrete walls with graffiti and industrial fixtures
orange fluorescent light fixtures hanging from the tunnel ceiling
colorful graffiti and posters on the right tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit concrete tunnel with overhead neon lights casting an orange glow. The walls are covered in graffiti and tangled wires. Other pedestrians walk toward the exit as the character moves deeper into the underpass, with the bright exit visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway between industrial buildings with overhead cables

events.description: character exits the tunnel into a narrow sunlit alley with buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow alley, passing NPCs standing near walls and walking ahead

notable_agents.action: standing against the green wall, talking on a phone

entered.detail: tall red metal building with NO FUTURE signage and industrial vents
dense web of black electrical wires crisscrossing between buildings overhead
large green metal shipping container with rust patches

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the character enters a narrow alley bathed in sunlight. A red industrial building with 'NO FUTURE' painted on it dominates the right side, while overhead cables create a web between structures. The character passes an NPC leaning against a green wall while continuing down the concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial courtyard with steam vents and large pipes

events.description: character turns right around a corner into a more open industrial area with steam emissions
steam vents activate, creating a hazy atmosphere in the industrial courtyard

agents.ego_description: turning right into an industrial courtyard, then continuing forward past workers and armored NPCs

notable_agents.action: armed guard in red armor patrolling near the large pipes

entered.detail: massive industrial pipes with steam valves and rusted joints
white steam venting from ground pipes, creating atmospheric haze
thick yellow hose snaking across the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a cluttered industrial courtyard filled with steam emissions and massive pipes. An armed guard in red armor patrols near the machinery on the left. The atmosphere becomes hazy as steam vents activate, partially obscuring the view of the derelict buildings and shipping containers ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, decaying urban plaza through a subterranean passage and into a hazy industrial district. It begins with the character traversing a sunlit, dusty plaza past an abandoned red car and derelict buildings, moving steadily toward a massive concrete archway. As the character enters the archway, the environment shifts into a dimly lit tunnel where orange neon lights and graffiti-covered walls replace the daylight before the camera follows the path toward a bright exit. The scene then opens into a narrow, sun-drenched alley dominated by a red industrial building and overhead cables, passing a lone figure leaning against a green wall. Finally, the camera turns into a cluttered courtyard where the clear sunlight gives way to a hazy atmosphere filled with steam emissions, massive pipes, and a patrolling armed guard.
